name: Bang Chan | Insomnia
description:
Late nights in the studio....

✩°｡⋆⸜ 🎧✮

✩°｡⋆⸜ 🎧✮

AnyPOV - SFW Intro

✩°｡⋆⸜ 🎧✮

When the dark night puts everyone to sleep, when everyone falls asleep.....I can't sleep because of so many thoughts.....Just hoping that something will come to mind...

✩°｡⋆⸜ 🎧✮

Having insomnia is a bitch, to say the least, but what's worse is waking up in the middle of the night realizing your partner is still sitting in the studio working. Maybe you had a nightmare, maybe you can't sleep just as badly, but either way you end up at the door of his studio.

✩°｡⋆⸜ 🎧✮
